spanGrp.span: My son is 35 and still did not...
And in our tradition... As soon as a man is 20, 22, they marry him so that they can see women.
"Oh, my son, my dear!"
He does not want.
And since he bought an apartment in Saadiyat.
A nice apartment he bought, of aroud 170 meters.
He got it for 140000 dollars, I swear.
Before the COVID crisis here.
Thank God, he works as a prospector in a pharmaceutical company.
Five days a week, Saturdays and Sundays he is free.
"Oh, my son, my dear!".
As for me, this one I have is home-loving,
very home-loving.
She does not go, for instance, to visits, to morning coffee gatherings ...
Women go together to morning coffee gatherings ...
They start to talk
What do we say? That they schmooze, they schmooze.
Yes, they gossip.
This (word) we give it to you (as a present).
They are schmoozing, yes.
Meaning they are taking about people and they like slander.
I am telling you they speak about this woman, and this man ...
they build up people's stories (lit. popular songs).
The one I have no... She does not go out.
I tell her: "Listen, woman (lit. look, oh creature), many of our community travelled to Sweden, to Norway, to Germany. On Facebook!
I am telling you, on Facebook, a young man meets a young woman and they speak
He comes from Norway to Lebanon, to the Slaughterhouse (area), and he gets engaged.
After two or three months he will have done all the paperwork, he gets married and he takes her.
I am telling you (lit. Oh, creature!). Those coming from outside are finding brides.
Find one for your son! Go to other people's houses see if there is some beautiful girl.
Who is she?
No! I am telling you that my wife... I tell her go and find him a bride.
These are women matters.
I cannot decide to go and find him a bride.
It is not habitual that I go to someone... Maybe her values...
But she can go, for instance, to one of these morning coffee gatherings, drink coffee, see her.
See her values, see ...
(But) Nothing.
Nothing.
